title: Deanshanger
description: Village and civil parish in England
extract: Deanshanger () is a village and civil parish in West Northamptonshire, England, near Milton Keynes. The population of the civil parish (including Puxley) at the 2011 census was 3,817. Deanshanger is 50 miles (80 km) northwest of London, 5 miles (8.0 km) northwest of Milton Keynes and 52 miles (84 km) southeast of Birmingham.
